leadText: Olive Oil (Japanese: オリーブオイル Olive Oil) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making a sandwich .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A condiment offering faint notes of sour and bitter flavors. The most prized varieties are the ones Smoliv love the smell of—such oils' quality is assured.

The most prized varieties are the ones Smoliv love the smell of—such oils' quality is assured.
